issues.description: FlipLife action is mandatory in DSL but card text says 'You may add' — should be optional. DSL lacks 'optional' flag or conditional structure to represent player choice.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Card text explicitly states 'during this turn' which requires duration 'DuringYourTurn', not EndOfTurn. Violation of duration rule.

Second effect with Trigger and PowerBoost is not supported by card text. Card mentions '(This card deals 2 damage)' as passive damage, not a triggered effect. This damage should be intrinsic to the card or handled differently, not as a separate Trigger effect.
Target restriction missing: card specifies 'Up to 1 of your {Land of Wano} type Characters', but DSL target only uses 'ChooseOwnCharacter' without the type filter.
